At its core, the idea of grit is about not giving up even when things get difficult.

name: Robert Cialdini
quotes: The way to love anything is to realize that it might be lost.
People simply like to have reasons — even if the reasons don't make much sense.
A well-known principle of human behavior says that when we ask someone to do us a favor we will be more successful if we provide a reason.
Once we have made a choice or taken a stand, we will encounter personal and interpersonal pressure to behave consistently with that commitment.
The greatest weapon is influence. The most important principle of influence is similarity.
Those who do not learn from the mistakes of their predecessors are destined to repeat them.
We are all influenced by the people around us, whether we know it or not.

name: Daniel Pink
quotes: Control leads to compliance; autonomy leads to engagement.
The secret to high performance and satisfaction is the deeply human need to direct our own lives.
Goals that people set for themselves and that are devoted to attaining mastery are usually healthy.
Human beings have an innate inner drive to be autonomous, self-determined, and connected to one another.
We are intrinsically motivated to do things that matter.
The most human capabilities are becoming the most economically valuable.
Purpose provides activation energy for living.

name: Yuval Noah Harari
quotes: Humans think in stories rather than in facts, numbers, or equations, and the simpler the story, the better.
We study history not to know the future but to widen our horizons, to understand that our present situation is neither natural nor inevitable.
Questions you cannot answer are usually far better for you than answers you cannot question.
The greatest crimes in modern history resulted not just from hatred and greed, but above all from ignorance and indifference.
In the twenty-first century we need to be far more creative in the ways we think about identity and community.
The idea that humans will always have a unique ability beyond the reach of non-conscious algorithms is just wishful thinking.
Self-knowledge is the beginning of wisdom.

name: Neil deGrasse Tyson
quotes: The universe is under no obligation to make sense to you.
For me, I am driven by two main philosophies: know more today about the world than I knew yesterday, and lessen the suffering of others.
The good thing about science is that it's true whether or not you believe in it.
Kids are never the problem. They are born scientists. The problem is always the adults, who beat the curiosity out of them.
I dream of a world where the truth is what shapes people's politics, rather than politics shaping what people think is true.
Science is not a body of facts. Science is a state of mind.
We are all connected — to each other biologically, to the earth chemically, to the rest of the universe atomically.

name: Fred Rogers
quotes: The greatest thing we can do is to help somebody know that they're loved and capable of loving.
Frankly, there isn't anyone you couldn't learn to love once you've heard their story.
Knowing that we can be loved exactly as we are gives us all the best opportunity for growing into the healthiest of people.
The greatest gift you ever give is your honest self.
It's not the honors and prizes and fancy outsides of life which ultimately nourish our souls.
You've made this day a special day, by just your being you. There's no person in the whole world like you, and I like you just the way you are.
Feeling good about ourselves is essential in our being able to love others.

name: Paulo Coelho
quotes: And, when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.
Tell your heart that the fear of suffering is worse than the suffering itself.
The secret of life is to fall seven times and to get up eight times.
It's the possibility of having a dream come true that makes life interesting.
One is loved because one is loved. No reason is needed for loving.
When you find your path, you must not be afraid. You need to have sufficient courage to make mistakes.
You are what you believe yourself to be.

name: Robin Sharma
quotes: Leadership is not about a title or a designation. It's about impact, influence, and inspiration.
The smallest of actions is always better than the noblest of intentions.
Every master was once a disaster.
Change is hard at first, messy in the middle, and gorgeous at the end.
Dream big. Start small. Begin now.
Be so good at what you do that people can't take their eyes off you.
Don't live the same year 75 times and call it a life.

name: Gabor Maté
quotes: Not why the addiction, but why the pain.
Trauma is not what happens to you. Trauma is what happens inside you as a result of what happened to you.
Compassion is not a relationship between the healer and the wounded. It's a relationship between equals.
The attempt to escape from pain is what creates more pain.
Children don't need to be taught how to learn; they are born learners.
The greatest damage done by neglect and trauma is not the immediate pain they inflict but the long-term distortions they induce in how a child will interpret the world.
To be fully human means to be fully ourselves — not in spite of our suffering, but through it.

name: Robert Greene
quotes: Mastery is not a function of genius or talent. It is a function of time and intense focus.
The most important quality for mastery is an insatiable hunger for learning.
Reframe your mental outlook: see your entry-level position not as something beneath your dignity, but as the perfect position from which to learn.
In the social realm, appearances are the reality.
The greatest mistake of life is to believe that we have all the time in the world to fulfill our dreams.
Become who you are by learning who you are.
You must work on yourself and your self-mastery first.

name: Ryan Holiday
quotes: The obstacle is the way.
Stillness is not the absence of life or action. It's actually what makes action possible.
Control your perceptions, direct your actions properly, willingly accept what's outside your control.
You don't control what happens. You control how you respond.
The world wants you to be typical — in a thousand ways, it pulls at you. Don't.
There's no good or bad without us — there is only perception. There is the event itself and the story we tell ourselves about what it means.
Ego is the enemy of what you want and of what you have.

name: Tim Ferriss
quotes: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
Focus on being productive instead of busy.
Being busy is a form of laziness — lazy thinking and indiscriminate action.
The question you should be asking isn't 'What do I want?' but 'What would excite me?'
Information is useless if it is not applied to something important.
Doing the impossible is not simply a matter of effort, but of perspective.
Life doesn't have to be so damn hard. It really doesn't. But it takes practice.

name: James Clear
quotes: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
Every action you take is a vote for the type of person you wish to become.
Success is the product of daily habits — not once-in-a-lifetime transformations.
The most effective form of learning is practice, not planning.
You should be far more concerned with your current trajectory than with your current results.
Goals are good for setting a direction, but systems are best for making progress.
Habits are the compound interest of self-improvement.

name: Nassim Nicholas Taleb
quotes: Wind extinguishes a candle and energizes fire. Likewise with randomness and chaos: you want to use them, not hide from them.
A Stoic is someone who transforms fear into prudence, pain into information, mistakes into initiation, and desire into undertaking.
The three most harmful addictions are heroin, carbohydrates, and a monthly salary.
Read books are far less valuable than unread ones. The library should contain as much of what you don't know as your financial means allow.
Real life is messy, inconsistent, and it's seldom when anything ever really resolves.
The weak shows his strength and hides his weaknesses; the magnificent exhibits his weaknesses like ornaments.
We are not rational enough to be exposed to the press.

name: Les Brown
quotes: You have greatness within you.
The graveyard is the richest place on earth — it contains all the dreams and ideas that were never fulfilled.
No one rises to low expectations.
If you set goals and go after them with all the determination you can muster, your gifts will take you places that will amaze you.
You don't have to be great to get started, but you have to get started to be great.
Forgive yourself for your faults and your mistakes and move on.
Shoot for the moon. Even if you miss, you'll land among the stars.

name: Tara Brach
quotes: Radical acceptance is the willingness to experience ourselves and our lives as they are.
The boundary to what we can accept is the boundary to our freedom.
Nothing is wrong — whatever is happening is just 'real life.'
The great gift of a spiritual path is coming to trust that it's safe to let go.
Meditation is all about the pursuit of nothingness. It's like the ultimate rest.
We get lost in doing, thinking, remembering, anticipating — lost in a maze of complexity. Mindfulness is the way home.
The most courageous thing any of us can do is to continue to open our hearts.

name: Pema Chödrön
quotes: You are the sky. Everything else is just the weather.
Nothing ever goes away until it has taught us what we need to know.
Feelings like disappointment, embarrassment, irritation, resentment, and fear, instead of being bad news, are very clear moments that teach us where it is that we're holding back.
Do I prefer that I be right, or that I be happy?
Life is a good teacher and a good friend.
The root of suffering is resisting the certainty that no matter what the circumstances, uncertainty is what's left.
We think that the point is to pass the test or overcome the problem, but the truth is that things don't really get resolved.

name: Ram Dass
quotes: Be here now.
The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
We are all just walking each other home.
The most important aspect of love is not in giving or the receiving — it's in the being.
You are loved just for being who you are, just for existing.
Treat everyone you meet like God in drag.
The spiritual journey is individual, highly personal. It can't be organized or regulated. It isn't true that everyone should follow one path.

name: Paramahansa Yogananda
quotes: Live quietly in the moment and see the beauty of all before you.
You must not let your life run in the ordinary way; do something that nobody else has done.
The soul loves to meditate, for in contact with the spirit lies its greatest joy.
There is a magnet in your heart that will attract true friends. That magnet is unselfishness.
Let my soul smile through my heart and my heart smile through my eyes.
Remain calm, serene, always in command of yourself. You will then find out how easy it is to get along.
The power of unfulfilled desires is the root of all man's slavery.

name: Swami Vivekananda
quotes: Take up one idea. Make that one idea your life — think of it, dream of it, live on that idea.
The greatest sin is to think yourself weak.
The world is the great gymnasium where we come to make ourselves strong.
We are what our thoughts have made us; so take care about what you think.
In a conflict between the heart and the brain, follow your heart.
All the powers in the universe are already ours. It is we who have put our hands before our eyes and cry that it is dark.
The more we come out and do good to others, the more our hearts will be purified.

name: Richard Dawkins
quotes: We are all atheists about most of the gods that humanity has ever believed in. Some of us just go one god further.
By all means let's be open-minded, but not so open-minded that our brains drop out.
One of the things that is wrong with religion is that it teaches us to be satisfied with answers which are not really answers at all.
Science is not only compatible with spirituality; it is a profound source of wonder.
The universe we observe has precisely the properties we should expect if there is, at bottom, no design, no purpose — nothing but blind, pitiless indifference.
If something is true, no amount of wishful thinking will make it false.
Evolution is a fact. Beyond reasonable doubt, beyond serious doubt, beyond sane, informed, intelligent doubt.

name: Sam Harris
quotes: The reality is that we have no idea where our thoughts come from, and most of them arise without our knowledge.
Beliefs matter — especially if they are false.
How can we build a future worth wanting if we have no vision of what we actually want?
The truth is, we do not experience the world directly. We experience a model of the world that our brains construct.
Mindfulness meditation is simply the practice of noticing what is already here.
To be wise is to be in possession of a clear picture of the world, or at least a somewhat less wrong one.
Our minds are the most complex things in the known universe, and the meditation techniques are the tools to understand them.

name: Earl Nightingale
quotes: We become what we think about.
The biggest mistake that you can make is to believe that you are working for somebody else.
Never give up on a dream just because of the time it will take to accomplish it. The time will pass anyway.
Your world is a living expression of how you are using and have used your mind.
People with goals succeed because they know where they're going.
A great attitude does much more than turn on the lights in our world — it seems to magically connect us to all sorts of opportunities.
Everything begins with an idea.

name: Erich Fromm
quotes: Creativity requires the courage to let go of certainties.
Immature love says: 'I love you because I need you.' Mature love says: 'I need you because I love you.'
If I am what I have and if I lose what I have who then am I?
Love is the only sane and satisfactory answer to the problem of human existence.
The task we must set for ourselves is not to feel secure, but to be able to tolerate insecurity.
Selfish persons are incapable of loving others, but they are not capable of loving themselves either.
The most beautiful as well as the most ugly inclinations of man are not part of a fixed and biologically given human nature, but result from the social process which creates man.

name: Albert Ellis
quotes: The best years of your life are the ones in which you decide your problems are your own.
People don't just get upset. They contribute to their upsetness.
You mainly feel the way you think.
The art of love is largely the art of persistence.
By not caring too much about what people think, I'm able to think for myself.
If you refuse to give yourself unconditional self-acceptance, you will almost inevitably create self-defeating beliefs.
There are three musts that hold us back: I must do well. You must treat me well. And the world must be easy.

name: B.F. Skinner
quotes: Education is what survives when what has been learned has been forgotten.
The way positive reinforcement is carried out is more important than the amount.
A failure is not always a mistake — it may simply be the best one can do under the circumstances. The real mistake is to stop trying.
Science is a willingness to accept facts even when they are opposed to wishes.
We shouldn't teach great books; we should teach a love of reading.
The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
We must appeal to the student's interest and motivation.

name: Erik Erikson
quotes: The most deadly of all possible sins is the mutilation of a child's spirit.
In the social jungle of human existence, there is no feeling of being alive without a sense of identity.
Life doesn't make any sense without interdependence. We need each other, and the sooner we learn that, the better for us all.
Healthy children will not fear life if their elders have integrity enough not to fear death.
The richest and fullest lives attempt to achieve an inner balance between three realms: work, love, and play.
Children love and want to be loved and they very much prefer the joy of accomplishment to the triumph of hateful failure.
You must learn to see yourself, recognize yourself, and love yourself.

name: Alfred Adler
quotes: The only normal people are the ones you don't know very well.
Man knows much more than he understands.
Trust only movement. Life happens at the level of events, not of words.
Meanings are not determined by situations, but we determine ourselves by the meanings we give to situations.
The chief danger in life is that you may take too many precautions.
It is easier to fight for one's principles than to live up to them.
Follow your heart but take your brain with you.

name: Martin Buber
quotes: All real living is meeting.
Every person born into this world represents something new, something that never existed before.
Play is the exaltation of the possible.
The free man is he who wills without caprice.
Through the Thou a person becomes I.
The world is not comprehensible, but it is embraceable — through the embracing of one of its beings.
Each one of us is a new thing in the world and is called upon to fulfill his particularity in this world.

name: Kahlil Gibran
quotes: Your children are not your children. They are the sons and daughters of Life's longing for itself.
Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls; the most massive characters are seared with scars.
Yesterday is but today's memory, and tomorrow is today's dream.
Your pain is the breaking of the shell that encloses your understanding.
We shall never understand one another until we reduce the language to seven words.
The timeless in you is aware of life's timelessness.
Beauty is not in the face; beauty is a light in the heart.

name: Buckminster Fuller
quotes: You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.
I am convinced all of humanity is born with more gifts than we know.
The best way to predict the future is to design it.
There is nothing in a caterpillar that tells you it's going to be a butterfly.
Dare to be naive.
When I am working on a problem, I never think about beauty. But when I have finished, if the solution is not beautiful, I know it is wrong.
We are called to be architects of the future, not its victims.

name: Warren Bennis
quotes: Leadership is the capacity to translate vision into reality.
Becoming a leader is synonymous with becoming yourself. It is precisely that simple and it is also that difficult.
The most dangerous leadership myth is that leaders are born.
A mentor is someone who allows you to see the hope inside yourself.
Good leaders make people feel that they're at the very heart of things, not at the periphery.
Trust is the lubrication that makes it possible for organizations to work.
Excellence is a better teacher than mediocrity. The lessons of the ordinary are everywhere — truly profound insights are found only in studying the exemplary.

name: Clayton Christensen
quotes: It's easier to hold your principles 100% of the time than it is to hold them 98% of the time.
Decide what you stand for. And then stand for it all the time.
Management is the most noble of professions if it's practiced well.
The only way I know to survive a busy life is to be deliberate about what matters.
If you have a clear, principled definition of what makes you happy, it will be much easier to build a life that matters.
The safest road to hell is the gradual one — the gentle slope, soft underfoot, without sudden turnings.
How will you measure your life?

name: Oprah Winfrey
quotes: The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
Turn your wounds into wisdom.
Be thankful for what you have; you'll end up having more.
Think like a queen. A queen is not afraid to fail. Failure is another stepping stone to greatness.
I know for sure what we dwell on is who we become.
Every day brings a chance for you to draw in a breath, kick off your shoes, and dance.
You get in life what you have the courage to ask for.

name: bell hooks
quotes: The function of art is to do more than tell it like it is — it's to imagine what is possible.
When we choose to love, we choose to move against fear — against alienation and separation.
The practice of love offers no place of safety. We risk loss, hurt, pain. We risk being acted upon by forces outside our control.
If we do not learn how to love, we will live in the shadow of our own inadequacy.
Inspired teaching keeps the spirit alive.
To be truly visionary we have to root our imagination in our concrete reality.
Living simply makes loving simple.

name: Oliver Sacks
quotes: I cannot pretend I am without fear. But my predominant feeling is one of gratitude.
To be ourselves we must have ourselves — possess, if need be re-possess, our life-stories.
We speak not only to tell other people what we think, but to tell ourselves what we think.
One is suddenly grateful for all pleasures, for all the everyday pleasures.
A man does not consist of memory alone. He has feeling, will, sensibility, moral being.
Creativity involves not just generating new ideas but also selecting, shaping, and embodying them.
There will be dying. There will be the last weeks, the last days — and then, only the love.

name: Peter Senge
quotes: Systems thinking is a discipline for seeing wholes.
Real learning gets to the heart of what it means to be human.
Learning organizations are organizations where people continually expand their capacity to create the results they truly desire.
The world we have created is a product of our thinking; it cannot be changed without changing our thinking.
All learning is ultimately about learning together.
The most fundamental dysfunction of the systems thinking, as a language, is our linear view of causality.
People don't resist change. They resist being changed.

name: Toni Morrison
quotes: If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else.
You are your best thing.
The function of freedom is to free someone else.
At some point in life the world's beauty becomes enough. You don't need to photograph, paint, or even remember it. It is enough.
Write. Start with a sentence, then go from there.
If you want to fly, you have to give up the things that weigh you down.
There is no time for despair, no place for self-pity, no need for silence, no room for fear.

name: James Baldwin
quotes: Not everything that is faced can be changed. But nothing can be changed until it is faced.
I imagine one of the reasons people cling to their hates so stubbornly is because they sense, once hate is gone, they will be forced to deal with pain.
The most dangerous creation of any society is the man who has nothing to lose.
Children have never been very good at listening to their elders, but they have never failed to imitate them.
The challenge is in the moment; the time is always now.
Not everything that is faced can be changed, but nothing can be changed until it is faced.
Hatred, which could destroy so much, never failed to destroy the man who hated.

name: Don Miguel Ruiz
quotes: Be impeccable with your word.
Don't take anything personally. Nothing others do is because of you.
Don't make assumptions. Find the courage to ask questions and to express what you really want.
Always do your best. Your best is going to change from moment to moment.
Real love is accepting other people the way they are without trying to change them.
The only way to change your world is to change yourself.
True justice is paying only once for each mistake.

name: Louise Hay
quotes: Every thought we think is creating our future.
You've been criticizing yourself for years and it hasn't worked. Try approving of yourself and see what happens.
I am in the right place, at the right time, doing the right thing.
Love is the greatest healing power I know.
Self-approval and self-acceptance in the now are the main keys to positive changes in every area of our lives.
Your thoughts and beliefs of the past have created this moment, and all the moments up to this moment.
I am in the process of positive change.

name: Byron Katie
quotes: When I argue with reality, I lose — but only 100% of the time.
It's not your job to like me — it's mine.
Life is simple. Everything happens for you, not to you.
Peace doesn't require two people; it only requires one. It has to be you.
The only time we suffer is when we believe a thought that argues with what is.
Reality is always kinder than the story we tell ourselves about it.
I don't let go of my thoughts — I meet them with understanding. Then they let go of me.

name: Marianne Williamson
quotes: Our deepest fear is not that we are inadequate. Our deepest fear is that we are powerful beyond measure.
Love is what we were born with. Fear is what we learned here.
Joy is what happens to us when we allow ourselves to recognize how good things really are.
The key to abundance is meeting limited circumstances with unlimited thoughts.
It is our light, not our darkness, that most frightens us.
Success means we go to sleep at night knowing that our talents and abilities were used in a way that served others.
Maturity includes the recognition that no one is going to see us completely, understand us completely, or give us everything we need.

name: Virginia Satir
quotes: The greatest gift I can give is to see, hear, understand, and touch another person.
We need 4 hugs a day for survival. We need 8 hugs a day for maintenance. We need 12 hugs a day for growth.
We must not allow other people's limited perceptions to define us.
People prefer the certainty of misery to the misery of uncertainty.
Feelings of worth can flourish only in an atmosphere where individual differences are appreciated.
Life is not what it's supposed to be. It's what it is. The way you cope with it is what makes the difference.
The family is a place where minds come in contact with one another.

name: John Gottman
quotes: Emotionally intelligent couples are intimately familiar with each other's world.
The antidote to contempt is expressing admiration and respect.
In every conflict, there is a legitimate concern and an unhelpful way of expressing it.
Healthy relationships are based on shared meaning and shared purpose.
The determining factor in whether wives feel satisfied with sex, romance, and passion in their marriages is the quality of the couple's friendship.
When the masters of marriage argue — and all couples do — they pepper their disputes with affection, teasing, and mutual respect.
Every positive thing you do in your relationship is a deposit in the emotional bank account.

name: Shunryu Suzuki
quotes: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities, but in the expert's mind there are few.
Each of you is perfect the way you are — and you can use a little improvement.
The most important thing is to find out what is the most important thing.
Without accepting the fact that everything changes, we cannot find perfect composure.
When you do something, you should burn yourself up completely, like a good bonfire, leaving no trace of yourself.
If you lose the spirit of repetition, your practice will become quite difficult.
To give your sheep or cow a large, spacious meadow is the way to control him.

name: Ken Wilber
quotes: An integral approach acknowledges that all views have a partial truth.
Spirit is not something that exists; it is the act of existing itself.
We are all equally expressions of the one consciousness.
We are all waves on the same ocean.
The goal is not to fix the broken self, but to realize there is no broken self — there is only the self that was never broken.
The more you identify with the witness, the more you realize that what you are is the witness.
Growth is the movement from the simple to the complex, from the unconscious to the conscious, from matter to life to mind.

name: Terence McKenna
quotes: Culture is your operating system.
The world is not made of quarks, electromagnetic waves, or any other such thing, but of stories.
Half the time you think you're thinking, you're actually listening.
Nature is not mute; it is man who is deaf.
The creative act is not hanging on, but yielding to a new creative movement.

If the words 'life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness' don't include the right to experiment with your own consciousness, then the Declaration of Independence isn't worth the hemp it was written on.
What you call reality is a cultural construct.

name: James Hillman
quotes: Each person enters the world called.
Dreams are the guiding words of the soul.
The growing point is not in the head, but in the soul.
We spend a great deal of time studying history, which, let's face it, is mostly the history of stupidity.
The soul of the world is in things and places, not just inside human minds.
Psyche's first task is to notice where it is and what it is doing.
To know your soul's calling requires listening to the world's crying.

name: Howard Thurman
quotes: Don't ask what the world needs. Ask what makes you come alive, and go do it. Because what the world needs is people who have come alive.
A dream is the bearer of a new possibility, the enlarged horizon, the great hope.
There is something in every one of you that waits and listens for the genuine in yourself.
Community cannot for long feed on itself; it can only flourish with the coming of others from beyond.
The movement of the spirit of man is the true test of civilization.
During times of war, hatred becomes quite respectable, even though it has to masquerade often as patriotism.
Seek always to do some good, somewhere. Every man has to seek in his own way to realize his true worth.

name: W. Edwards Deming
quotes: It is not necessary to change. Survival is not mandatory.
In God we trust; all others bring data.
Without data you're just another person with an opinion.
The most important things cannot be measured.
Learning is not compulsory — neither is survival.
Quality is everyone's responsibility.
You cannot inspect quality into the product; it is already there.

name: Paul Tillich
quotes: The first duty of love is to listen.
Boredom is rage spread thin.
Language has created the word 'loneliness' to express the pain of being alone. And it has created the word 'solitude' to express the glory of being alone.
The awareness of the ambiguity of one's highest achievements is a sign of maturity.
Faith is the state of being ultimately concerned.
He who knows about depth knows about God.
The courage to be is the ethical act in which man affirms his own being in spite of those elements of his existence which conflict with his essential self-affirmation.

name: Reinhold Niebuhr
quotes: God grant me the serenity to accept the things I cannot change, courage to change the things I can, and wisdom to know the difference.
Nothing worth doing is completed in our lifetime.
Man's capacity for justice makes democracy possible, but man's inclination to injustice makes democracy necessary.
Frantic orthodoxy is never rooted in faith but in doubt.
Love is the motive, but justice is the instrument.
The sad duty of politics is to establish justice in a sinful world.

One of the most pathetic aspects of human history is that every civilization expresses itself most pretentiously, compounds its partial and universal values most convincingly, and claims immortality for its finite existence at the very moment when the decay which leads to death has already begun.

name: Thomas Kuhn
quotes: The answers you get depend on the questions you ask.
Almost always the men who achieve fundamental inventions of a new paradigm have been either very young or very new to the field.
Under normal conditions the research scientist is not an innovator but a solver of puzzles.
The transition from a paradigm in crisis to a new one is not a cumulative process.
In learning a paradigm the scientist acquires theory, methods, and standards together.
Scientific development depends in part on a process of non-incremental or revolutionary change.
The most important thing I can do is bring a new problem to the surface.

name: Cornel West
quotes: You can't lead the people if you don't love the people. You can't save the people if you don't serve the people.
Justice is what love looks like in public.
Democracy is not just a system of government; it's a way of life.
Integrity is saying what I mean and meaning what I say.
The examined life requires courage and honesty.
Never forget that justice is what love looks like in public, just as care is what love feels like in private.
In these times of spectacle and superficiality, we need a bluesman sensibility that keeps alive the tradition of speaking truth.

name: John Wooden
quotes: Success is peace of mind which is a direct result of self-satisfaction in knowing you made the effort to become the best of which you are capable.
Be more concerned with your character than your reputation, because your character is what you really are, while your reputation is merely what others think you are.
Talent is God given. Be humble. Fame is man-given. Be grateful. Conceit is self-given. Be careful.
It's what you learn after you know it all that counts.
Never mistake activity for achievement.
Young people need models, not critics.
The main ingredient of stardom is the rest of the team.

name: Og Mandino
quotes: Beginning today, treat everyone you meet as if they were going to be dead by midnight.
I will love the light for it shows me the way, yet I will endure the darkness for it shows me the stars.
It is those who concentrate on but one thing at a time who advance in this world.
Never feel shame for trying and failing — he who has never failed is he who has never tried.
Sound character provides the power with which a person may ride the emergencies of life instead of being overwhelmed by them.
Take the attitude of a student: never be too big to ask questions, never know too much to learn something new.
I will act now. I will act now. I will act now.

name: Jocko Willink
quotes: Discipline equals freedom.
You must own everything in your world. There is no one else to blame.
Don't count on motivation; count on discipline.
There are no bad teams, only bad leaders.
Prioritize and execute. Even the best leaders cannot effectively manage multiple crises at once.
Leadership requires belief in the mission and unyielding perseverance to achieve victory.
Get up. Make your bed. Drink water. Take a cold shower. Get after it.
